[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 6/1 (Mon), Lesson reward will be tripled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to power up your students!

🗓️Period: 6/1 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 6/8 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
